title: FIX Message Builder workspace link (links/<id>.json)
description: One FIX link (compiles to a system + its Client/Route dimension options). File name = link id. docs/PROFILE-WORKSPACE.md §4.2.

session.description: Session/routing tags (49/56, comp ids…). tag → value map. Values are literal strings or {"generator": "<name>"}. Sugar for a fragment of set/setGenerated ops — need remove/group ops? use raw fragments (docs/PROFILE-WORKSPACE.md rung 2/3).

client.description: Single client, no dropdown. Client entry: parties + account sugar (compiles to a Parties(453) group op and an Account(1) slot/set). Optional 'convention' switches instrument identity while this client is selected; optional raw 'ops' append.

default.description: Pre-selected when the profile loads (one per dimension).

editable.description: false → fixed set op instead of an editable slot (default true)

convention.description: Identity-convention override while this client is selected (precedence: option > link).

ops.description: Raw fragment ops appended after the sugar (rung 2).

clients.description: Client selector: id → config. Same id on several links must be identical (shared option).

additionalProperties.description: Client entry: parties + account sugar (compiles to a Parties(453) group op and an Account(1) slot/set). Optional 'convention' switches instrument identity while this client is selected; optional raw 'ops' append.

default.description: Pre-selected when the profile loads (one per dimension).

editable.description: false → fixed set op instead of an editable slot (default true)

convention.description: Identity-convention override while this client is selected (precedence: option > link).

ops.description: Raw fragment ops appended after the sugar (rung 2).

routes.description: Route selector: id → config (coherent tag combinations steering the router).

additionalProperties.description: Route entry: a coherent tag combination (e.g. HandlInst+Text) selected as one choice.

fields.description: tag → value map. Values are literal strings or {"generator": "<name>"}. Sugar for a fragment of set/setGenerated ops — need remove/group ops? use raw fragments (docs/PROFILE-WORKSPACE.md rung 2/3).

enforced.description: Compiles to the finalFragment — always wins, nothing can override. tag → value map. Values are literal strings or {"generator": "<name>"}. Sugar for a fragment of set/setGenerated ops — need remove/group ops? use raw fragments (docs/PROFILE-WORKSPACE.md rung 2/3).

finalFragment.description: Raw fragment ref alternative to 'enforced' (mutually exclusive).

convention.description: Identity convention (conventions/<name>.json) for instruments on this link.

algos.description: Opt-in flows enabled on this link (flow ids).

transportHints.description: Opaque per-link routing data handed to the internal host page with every send.

extends.description: Inherit another link's keys (one level; a key you set replaces wholesale).

fragments.description: Raw fragment refs appended after the sugar-generated ones (rung 2).
